assertions.description: 9 gerber files, 2 drill files detected. Found layers match 4-layer stack (F.Cu, B.Cu, In1.Cu, In2.Cu, plus mask/silk/edge). Missing F.Paste noted as recommended (not required). Board dimensions 15.12x29.15mm match PCB output exactly. complete=true is correct.
assertions.aspirational_reason: auto-generated check path incorrect for PCB/gerber output

assertions.description: All gerber entries have role=None and layer=None even though layer_type is correctly parsed (e.g., 'B.Cu', 'In1.Cu'). If role/layer are supposed to be populated from X2 attributes or filename mapping, they appear to be missing output fields.
